dorks.title: Juicy Extensions
dorks.google: site:example.com ext:log | ext:txt | ext:conf | ext:cnf | ext:ini | ext:env | ext:sh | ext:bak | ext:backup | ext:swp | ext:old
dorks.bing: site:example.com (ext:log OR ext:txt OR ext:conf OR ext:ini OR ext:env OR ext:bak OR ext:backup)
dorks.duckduckgo: site:example.com (.log OR .txt OR .conf OR .env OR .bak OR .backup)
dorks.brave: site:example.com (ext:log OR ext:txt OR ext:env OR ext:bak)

dorks.title: Backup Files
dorks.google: site:example.com ext:bak | ext:backup | ext:old | ext:save | ext:sql | ext:zip | ext:tar.gz | ext:tar | inurl:backup | inurl:dump
dorks.bing: site:example.com (ext:bak OR ext:backup OR ext:old OR ext:sql OR ext:zip OR url:backup OR url:dump)
dorks.duckduckgo: site:example.com (.bak OR .backup OR .old OR .sql OR backup OR dump)
dorks.brave: site:example.com (ext:bak OR ext:backup OR ext:sql OR url:backup)

dorks.title: Exposed .env Files
dorks.google: site:example.com ext:env | intext:"DB_PASSWORD" | intext:"DATABASE_PASSWORD" | intext:"API_KEY" | intext:"SECRET_KEY" | intext:"AWS_ACCESS" | intext:"AWS_SECRET" | intext:"AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" | intext:"API_KEY="

dorks.title: Version Control Exposure
dorks.google: site:example.com inurl:".git" | inurl:"/.git/config" | inurl:"/.git/HEAD" | inurl:"/.git/index" | inurl:".svn" | inurl:"/.svn/entries"
dorks.bing: site:example.com (url:.git OR url:/.git/config OR url:/.git/HEAD OR url:.svn)

dorks.title: Sensitive Documents
dorks.google: site:example.com ext:txt | ext:pdf | ext:xml | ext:xls | ext:xlsx | ext:ppt | ext:pptx | ext:doc | ext:docx intext:"confidential" | intext:"Not for Public Release" | intext:"internal use only"
dorks.bing: site:example.com (ext:pdf OR ext:doc OR ext:docx OR ext:xls OR ext:xlsx) ("confidential" OR "internal use only")

dorks.title: Sensitive Parameters
dorks.google: site:example.com inurl:email= | inurl:phone= | inurl:name= | inurl:user= inurl:&

dorks.title: High % inurl keywords
dorks.google: site:example.com inurl:conf | inurl:env | inurl:cgi | inurl:bin | inurl:etc | inurl:root | inurl:sql | inurl:backup | inurl:admin | inurl:php
dorks.bing: site:example.com (url:conf OR url:env OR url:admin OR url:backup OR url:sql)
dorks.duckduckgo: site:example.com (conf OR env OR admin OR backup OR sql)

dorks.title: Directory Listings
dorks.google: site:example.com intitle:"index of" | intitle:"directory listing" | intitle:"directory of" | intext:"parent directory"
dorks.bing: site:example.com (title:"index of" OR title:"directory listing" OR "parent directory")

dorks.title: Archive Files
dorks.google: site:example.com ext:zip | ext:tar | ext:gz | ext:rar | ext:7z | ext:tgz
dorks.bing: site:example.com (ext:zip OR ext:tar OR ext:gz OR ext:rar OR ext:7z)
dorks.brave: site:example.com (ext:zip OR ext:tar OR ext:gz OR ext:rar)
dorks.baidu: site:example.com (filetype:zip OR filetype:tar OR filetype:gz OR filetype:rar)
dorks.mojeek: site:example.com zip tar gz rar archive

dorks.title: Nginx Config Files
dorks.google: site:example.com ("nginx.conf" ext:conf) | intitle:"index of" "nginx.conf" | intext:"nginx" "config" ext:txt

dorks.title: Credentials Files
dorks.google: site:example.com inurl:/credentials/ | intext:"username" intext:"password" ext:txt | ext:log

dorks.title: SQL Files
dorks.google: site:example.com ext:sql | intext:"INSERT INTO" ext:sql | intext:"CREATE TABLE" ext:sql

dorks.title: Application Log Files
dorks.google: site:example.com inurl:/logs/ intext:"API" | inurl:/logs/ intext:"audit" | inurl:/logs/ intext:"transaction" | inurl:/logs/ intext:"user login"
dorks.bing: site:example.com url:/logs/ (API OR audit OR transaction OR "user login")
dorks.brave: site:example.com url:/logs/ (API OR audit OR transaction)

dorks.title: Database Credentials
dorks.google: site:example.com intext:"DB_HOST=" | intext:"DB_USER=" | intext:"DB_PASS=" | intext:"DB_PASSWORD=" | intext:"DATABASE_URL="
